Asleep most of the time with other scoter flock but showing white nape clearly. Both woke up once each and showed bills off nicely.
Mother with four fledglings, extremely dull plumage especially on heads and learning to forage.
Heard a pig like squeal by the river, from the tall grasses.
Carrying a big bunch of leaves and sticks while swimming.

Several on the ocean, masses nesting on the cliffside by the closed-off beach. Counted on the cliff by threes.
